mapper.insert: INSERT INTO private_chat_conversation (id, user_id_1, user_id_2, create_time, is_active, service_domain_id, service_id, service_name) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId1}, #{userId2}, #{createTime}, #{isActive}, #{serviceDomainId},#{serviceId},#{serviceName})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id_1, user_id_2, create_time, end_time, is_active, service_domain_id, service_id, service_name, score FROM private_chat_conversation WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id_1, user_id_2, create_time, end_time, is_active, service_domain_id, service_id, service_name, score FROM private_chat_conversation WHERE ((user_id_1 = #{userId1} AND user_id_2 = #{userId2}) OR (user_id_1 = #{userId2} AND user_id_2 = #{userId1})) AND is_active in (1,3) LIMIT 1
SELECT score FROM private_chat_conversation WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id_1, user_id_2, create_time, end_time, is_active, service_domain_id, service_id, service_name, score FROM private_chat_conversation WHERE ((user_id_1 = #{userId} OR user_id_2 = #{userId}) AND is_active IN (0, 2)) AND create_time >= #{startDate} AND service_domain_id = #{serviceDomainId}
